Transcrição Completa: Section 11 - Tornando-se o Líder de Mercado
Conversa
[00:00]
"Section 11. One more left. Super excited. I love I love this. Now we've finalized the one page attack and conquer plan. We've talked about how to measure it. We've talked about how to roll out the team. We understand the core values."
[00:15]
"Now it's time to become the market leader in your niche. You're going to do that through market leader content and creating a magnetic website, which we're going to talk about."
[00:25]
"So what is market leader content? So right now take a screenshot, take notes. Super super super super important that we we dive into this."
[00:35] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Market Leader Content"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Apresentação de conceito principal sobre conteúdo de liderança de mercado, estrutura de tópicos principais
[00:40]
"Market leader content are things like customer results, right? Go get great reviews, right? Create a section on your site."
[00:48]
"You know, every time you win an account and you're a week or two working with them, that's the best time to ask for a testimonial because everybody it's it's it's it's the start of the relationship. Everybody's fired up. Go get that testimonial, right? Capture that testimonial."
[01:05] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Customer Results"
NÚMEROS: 1-2 semanas (timing ideal para testemunhos)
VISUAL: Seção destacando resultados de clientes, momento ideal para captura de testemunhos, processo de coleta de feedback
[01:10]
"Uh once you start delivering results, take the time and invest to build amazing case studies with visuals and numbers and client uh uh quotes in there. Interview, get video."
[01:22]
"You're going to see that I'm going to say video, video, video, and more video. Take the time, invest, and go getting video from your clients, right?"
[01:32]
"Do the things and that go back to your competitive analysis. How many of your competitors have these great customer results? I mean, video case studies, documentaries, interviews, reviews, testimonials, quotes."
[01:45]
"Remember, you want your clients selling for you versus you having to sell."
[01:50] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Credibility Assets"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Lista de ativos de credibilidade, elementos que estabelecem autoridade de mercado
[01:52]
"Credibility assets. What makes you the market leader? Right? Are there any relevant awards that you should be applying for and winning?"
[02:00]
"You know, years in business, number of staff, number of projects completed, number of locations, press, you know, go build a relationship with Forester, Gartner, um, you know, Mashable, AdWeek, Adage."
[02:15]
"How do you get exposure? How do you align yourself with people that are already credible and resources that are credible to then give you credibility?"
[02:25] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Intellectual Property"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Seção sobre propriedade intelectual, diferenciação através de processos e tecnologia proprietária
[02:28]
"The other thing is intellectual property. Um you know whether that's process or technology um how you know how you have built something that no competitor um has or a a niche process the competitors do not right exploit that."
[02:45]
"Hey we deliver the fastest to market because of our unique process that's you know proprietary to us we've built this piece of technology that no other competitor has let me demonstrate it to you right."
[02:56]
"What are you doing that's more than me too that's incremental from a tech piece or a process piece and then you evangelize that externally because it then points to you as the market leader."
[03:08] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Culture as Differentiator"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Cultura como diferencial competitivo, valores centrais como vantagem de mercado
[03:10]
"Culture, we've talked a lot about that, right? Culture is a differentiator. If you're living those core values and you've brought them alive to life visually and you've created what it means to the customer, that should be on the website. That should be in your pitch decks."
[03:25]
"None of your competitors are thinking that way, right? They're talking about, you know, speed, service, and uh cost, you know, and you're going to have to talk about those things. But you can also now add core values and how it's a differentiator and position you as the market leader."
[03:40]
"And again, video, video, video, video, and more video."
[03:45] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "2020 Video Content Statistics"
NÚMEROS: 86% de todo conteúdo consumido em 2020 será vídeo
VISUAL: Estatística destacada sobre consumo de vídeo, ênfase na importância do formato visual
[03:48]
"There was a stat that I just read that 86% of all content consumed in 2020 is going to be video. Get video frequently. Position yourself as the market leader."
[04:00] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Workshop Time - Action Items"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Seção de exercício prático, lista de tarefas imediatas, plano de ação
[04:02]
"All right, workshop time. I want you to write down right now all the credibility assets you have now and the ones that you need. Right? Think this through. Write them down and then write the ones that you're missing and then build a plan right now to how you're going to go update your website."
[04:20]
"I'm going to show you some examples of how this is brought to life in the next sections, but right now go build a plan. Take action now to start making your external presence bigger."
[04:30]
"Take out your one page attack and conquer plan. How do you take this plan and bring it to life in a website? How do you get the assets you need to become the niche market leader that you're becoming?"
[04:42]
"I'll see you in the next section."
📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO
NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:
86% de todo conteúdo consumido em 2020 será vídeo
1-2 semanas: timing ideal para solicitar testemunhos de novos clientes
ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:
Market Leader Content: Criação de conteúdo que posiciona como líder de nicho
Customer Results: Reviews, testemunhos, case studies com visuais e números, vídeos de clientes
Credibility Assets: Prêmios, anos no mercado, número de staff, projetos completados, localizações, exposição na imprensa
Intellectual Property: Processos proprietários e tecnologia exclusiva
Culture as Differentiator: Valores centrais como diferencial competitivo
Video Strategy: Ênfase massiva em conteúdo em vídeo (mencionado 8+ vezes)
ESTRUTURA:
Componentes do Market Leader Content:
Resultados de clientes (reviews, testemunhos, case studies, vídeos)
Ativos de credibilidade (prêmios, métricas, press coverage)
Propriedade intelectual (processos e tecnologia proprietária)
Cultura organizacional (valores centrais como diferencial)
Relacionamentos estratégicos sugeridos: Forester, Gartner, Mashable, AdWeek, Adage
DADOS FINANCEIROS: Não mencionados nesta seção
AÇÕES IMEDIATAS:
Listar todos os credibility assets atuais
Identificar credibility assets faltantes
Criar plano para atualização do website
Integrar o one-page attack and conquer plan ao website
Começar produção de conteúdo em vídeo
DURAÇÃO: ~4:45 minutos FORMATO: Vídeo educacional/treinamento - Section 11 de série sobre liderança de mercado
